content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Opinion Request Meeting Participants and File - 2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18901

Date: April 16, 1982

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Barbara A. Milman

Subject: 2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18901(d)(1)

If anyone asks about Section 18001(d)(1), our interpretation of this subsection is that a mailing is not a prohibited mass mailing under Government Code Section 89001 if less than 200 pieces are sent within the jurisdiction or district of the declaration of candidacy, regardless of how many pieces are sent outside the jurisdiction or district.

BAM:plh
